title: Phase 2: Build the PWA + custom harness with /admin observability

statusLegend.staged: scaffolded on disk; needs phase 1 (or other dep) to verify end-to-end

stories.title: Scaffold SvelteKit PWA in pwa/
stories.note: Project files written; npm install not yet verified in this env. Run `npm install && npm run check` when you're back online.

stories.title: Backend skeleton: /api/chat streaming endpoint
stories.note: SSE streaming + multi-turn tool-use loop in src/routes/api/chat/+server.ts. Blocked on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY at runtime.

stories.title: Tool: search_brain (Graphiti hybrid search)
stories.note: Calls /search/hybrid; returns brain_offline if Graphiti unreachable (phase-1-blocked).

stories.title: Tool: recall_similar_outreach
stories.note: Filters search_nodes to Outreach. Same phase-1 dependency.

stories.title: Tool: get_company (one-hop neighborhood)
stories.note: search_nodes + get_node. Neighborhood shape is a placeholder; phase 1 will pin the real response shape.

stories.title: Tool: add_episode (fire-and-forget queue)
stories.note: Inserts to brain.pending_episodes (table created). Background drainer NOT built yet — see plans/phase-2-decisions.md §D9.

stories.title: Tool: draft_outreach (compound)
stories.note: Orchestrates similar-outreach + get_company + voice-rules. Voice rules are hard-coded until phase 1 ships the load-at-boot path.

stories.title: Tools: save_draft + list_drafts (and brain.drafts table)
stories.note: Migration written. Tools functional once Postgres has the schema applied.

stories.title: Chat UI: streaming markdown with inline tool-call cards
stories.note: MessageBubble + ToolCallCard. Tool-call cards not yet wired to live stream events — currently they appear only when constructed client-side from server-side multi-turn results.

stories.title: Outreach workflow form at /draft
stories.note: Form UI rendered; submit handler not wired. Treat as placeholder until chat-first usage proves a form is actually needed.

stories.title: Postgres brain.tool_calls table for observability
stories.note: Migration 003. Run `npm run migrate` when DB is reachable.

stories.title: Tool-call instrumentation wrapper
stories.note: lib/server/tools/instrument.ts. Logs best-effort; failures don't block tools.

stories.title: /admin route with summary cards, cost chart, and recent activity
stories.note: Cards + recent table done. Cost chart deferred until real data is flowing.

stories.title: Anthropic spend pricing table
stories.note: lib/server/pricing.ts. Verify numbers against anthropic.com/pricing before first deploy.

stories.title: Add pwa service to docker-compose
stories.note: Snippet in pwa/deploy/docker-compose.pwa.yml — merge into main compose once it exists. graphiti/falkordb depends_on are commented out until phase 1 brings them up.

stories.title: Caddy route for app.{domain} with cookie auth path
stories.note: Snippet in pwa/deploy/Caddyfile.snippet. Cookie auth implementation deferred — header-only for now.
